ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was completed */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the property */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the real estate agent */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sale, lease) */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was closed */,
  "closing_cost" REAL /* Closing cost of the transaction */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan used in the transaction (e.g., conventional, FHA) */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan */,
  "down_payment" REAL /* Down payment amount */,
  "financing_status" TEXT /* Status of the financing (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  "mortgage_rate" REAL /* Interest rate on the mortgage */,
  "mortgage_term" INTEGER /* Term of the mortgage (in years) */,
  "down_payment_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the sale price paid as down payment */,
  "title_company" TEXT /* Name of the title company */,
  "escrow_company" TEXT /* Name of the escrow company */,
  "inspection_company" TEXT /* Name of the inspection company */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the property inspection */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the property inspection */,
  "appraisal_company" TEXT /* Name of the appraisal company */,
  "appraisal_date" TEXT /* Date of the property appraisal */,
  "appraisal_value" REAL /* Appraised value of the property */,
  "escrow_number" TEXT /* Escrow number */,
  "title_number" TEXT /* Title number */,
  "loan_officer" TEXT /* Name of the loan officer */,
  "loan_officer_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the loan officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user table */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the agent */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience in real estate */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the agent (out of 5) */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the agent */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* File path to the agent's profile picture */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent's office */,
  "office_address" TEXT /* Address of the agent's office */,
  "office_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent's office */,
  "office_email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent's office */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the agent operates in */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards and recognitions received by the agent */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the agent */,
  "languages_spoken" TEXT /* Languages spoken by the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property table */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., structural, amenities, utilities) */,
  "feature_status" TEXT /* Status of the feature (e.g., installed, under construction) */,
  "feature_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property table */,
  "photo_path" TEXT /* File path to the photo */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the photo */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the photo was uploaded */,
  "photo_type" TEXT /* Type of photo (e.g., exterior, interior, garden) */,
  "photo_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the photo */,
  "photo_orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the photo (e.g., landscape, portrait) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property table */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., inspection report, title document) */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_format" TEXT /* Format of the document (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "document_version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property table */,
  "video_path" TEXT /* File path to the video */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the video */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  "video_type" TEXT /* Type of video (e.g., virtual tour, drone footage) */,
  "video_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the video */,
  "video_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the video in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the property */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was viewed */,
  "view_type" TEXT /* Type of view (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for viewing (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "view_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the view in seconds */,
  "view_source" TEXT /* Source of the view (e.g., website, app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id")
)
